title: papaver refractum
intro: Papaver refractum, also known as refracted poppy or Turkish poppy, is a flowering plant in the poppy family (Papaveraceae) that is native to the mountainous regions of Turkey and the Caucasus. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and sedative effects. The health benefits of Papaver refractum include relief from pain, anxiety, and insomnia, as well as potential anti-cancer properties. Papaver refractum can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
